title: calceolariaceae
intro: Calceolariaceae is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of flowering plant families that are typically herbaceous perennials, often with delicate, bell-shaped flowers. This family is characterized by its unique floral structure and typically bears seeds within a capsule. Calceolariaceae includes species found in various parts of the world, often in shaded or woodland environments. The family is relatively small, with around 200 species spread across several genera.
